idea-plugin.name: Agent Hub
idea-plugin.description:
Agent Hub brings your favorite coding agent right into your JetBrains IDE. It adds a tool window to the right side bar (next to Database, Gradle, and friends) with an embedded terminal that automatically launches a coding agent CLI in your project.

By default it opens with Claude Code. You can choose a preferred agent and the choice is remembered across projects and restarts. Support for more agents (GitHub Copilot CLI, OpenAI Codex CLI, OpenCode, and more) is on the roadmap.

Agent Hub is cross-platform and works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
